description: List knowledge documents in the unified knowledge store. Use this to browse the four top-level types: design, memory, skill, and reference. Returns plain text with one type-prefixed `path` per line, such as `skill/build-pipeline.md`.

pathPrefix.description: Optional type-prefixed path prefix such as `design/`, `design/combat/`, or `skill/unity/`. When omitted, all knowledge types are listed.
